title: IDOR Vulnerability in Enterprise API
description: An insecure direct object reference (IDOR) was found in the enterprise API endpoints, allowing unauthorized access to cross-tenant data. This lead to a major data exposure incident.

title: Broken Access Control in WordPress Plugin
description: Unauthorized access to sensitive administrative functions due to improper authorization checks in a popular WooCommerce plugin.

title: Sudo Baron Samedit - Heap-Based Buffer Overflow
description: A heap-based buffer overflow in sudo allows any local user to gain root privileges without authentication.

title: Forced Browsing in Zabbix Frontend
description: Forced browsing vulnerability in Zabbix frontend allows an authenticated user to access restricted pages by modifying URL parameters directly.

title: Horizontal Privilege Escalation in Rocket.Chat
description: Improper authorization checks in Rocket.Chat allow attackers to read messages and access resources belonging to other users at the same privilege level.

title: Missing Function-Level Access Control in 7-Zip
description: A vulnerability in 7-Zip allows attackers to escalate privileges by accessing administrative functions that are not properly protected.
